message:
refactor(e2e): clean up SSI and busy-retry test suites for immutable borrow semantics

SSI serialization anomaly test:
- Changed Connection parameters from &mut to & (immutable borrows)
  throughout, reflecting that fsqlite::Connection methods no longer
  require &mut self. Affects run_fsqlite(), begin_and_prepare_fsqlite_txn(),
  and commit_in_order_fsqlite().
- Consolidated DisjointWrites match arms: merged duplicate (DisjointWrites, 0)
  case with HotRowConflict variants using (DisjointWrites, 0) | (HotRowConflict, 0 | 1).

Busy-retry error semantics test:
- Added #[expect(clippy::struct_excessive_bools)] on ConcurrentModeGuard
  with explanatory reason string, as the four boolean fields represent
  a stable concurrent-mode artifact shape.
- Replaced Ok(_) with Ok(()) in two match arms for idiomatic unit result
  pattern matching.
- Replaced .map_or(true, ...) with .is_none_or(...) for cleaner option
  boolean checks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
